reasoning: The control A.5.22 focuses on monitoring, reviewing, and managing changes in supplier services. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that RBAC policies are reviewed and updated to reflect changes in supplier services, logging changes to supplier-related configurations, using admission controllers to enforce change management policies, and monitoring network policies to ensure supplier services are appropriately controlled. These functions ensure that any changes in supplier services are tracked, reviewed, and managed within the Kubernetes environment.
title: Monitor, Review And Change Management Of Supplier Services
